headline: Rapid Valley Annihilation: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Rapid Valley Annihilation carries a championship-lineup C-AVI average of 68.16, led by Colston Loveland, Quinshon Judkins, and Caleb Williams. The clearest lineup pressure point is the FLEX slot held by Blake Corum at 54.2 C-AVI.

recent_trades.summary: On July 8, Rapid Valley Annihilation traded with Corgi Loaf Baking Co. and acquired 2027 Round 1 (original roster 11), 2028 Round 1 (original roster 11) while sending 2026 Round 1 (original roster 2). The transaction moved out 1 draft asset, which reduces the franchise's remaining draft flexibility relative to keeping those picks. It added 2 draft assets to the franchise's asset base at the time of the deal.

On June 18, Rapid Valley Annihilation traded with Corgi Loaf Baking Co. and acquired Quentin Johnston, 2027 Round 2 (original roster 11) while sending Kyle Pitts. Quentin Johnston is now the verified WR starter at 59.0 C-AVI and 70.4 D-AVI. It added 1 draft asset to the franchise's asset base at the time of the deal.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Colston Loveland (98.0), Quinshon Judkins (75.8), and Caleb Williams (71.4).

sections.title: Recent Trade Impact
sections.body: On July 8, Rapid Valley Annihilation traded with Corgi Loaf Baking Co. and acquired 2027 Round 1 (original roster 11), 2028 Round 1 (original roster 11) while sending 2026 Round 1 (original roster 2). The transaction moved out 1 draft asset, which reduces the franchise's remaining draft flexibility relative to keeping those picks. It added 2 draft assets to the franchise's asset base at the time of the deal. On June 18, Rapid Valley Annihilation traded with Corgi Loaf Baking Co. and acquired Quentin Johnston, 2027 Round 2 (original roster 11) while sending Kyle Pitts. Quentin Johnston is now the verified WR starter at 59.0 C-AVI and 70.4 D-AVI. It added 1 draft asset to the franchise's asset base at the time of the deal.

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Blake Corum is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 54.2. Any acquisition should clear that lineup threshold.

sections.title: Depth and Flexibility
sections.body: The team file contains 11 offensive players, with 3 outside the modeled starting eight. The offensive roster D-AVI average is 72.13.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 11 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
